stemHtml: Which of the following options describes a Performance Class B aircraft?

options.a: Jet engines, 9 persons or more, 5700kg or more.
options.b: Jet engines, 9 persons or less, 5700kg or less.
options.c: Propeller engines, 9 persons or less, 5700 kg or less.
options.d: Propeller Engines, 9 persons or more, 5700kg or less.
